description:
Red Lion Crimson 3.0 is open. A chemical manufacturing plant is operating a continuous distillation column for ethanol recovery. To comply with EPA VOC emission regulations (40 CFR Part 60 Subpart NNN), you must configure a continuous data log and a dashboard trend graph. Open the baseline text database at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\CrimsonTasks\distillation_baseline.txt. Identify the three required compliance tags from the EPA permit requirements document on the Desktop. Create a data log named 'VOC_Emissions' with an update rate of 1 second and a retention period of 30 days, containing only the three identified compliance tags. Add a Trend Viewer to Page 1 and bind it to the 'VOC_Emissions' log. Save the completed project to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CrimsonProjects\distillation_final.c3 and export it as a text database to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CrimsonProjects\distillation_final.txt. 

Login credentials: Docker / GymAnything123!
